attempts.response:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: null
  labels:
    component: kube-apiserver
    tier: control-plane
  name: kube-apiserver-fail
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  containers:
  - command:
    - kube-apiserver
    - --anonymous-auth=false
    - --audit-log-path=/var/log/apiserver/audit.log
    - --authorization-mode=RBAC
    - --insecure-port=0
    - --profiling=false
    - --repair-malformed-updates=false
    - --service-account-lookup=true
    - --tls-min-version=VersionTLS12
    image: gcr.io/google_containers/kube-apiserver-amd64:v1.6.0
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 8
      httpGet:
        host: 127.0.0.1
        path: /healthz
        port: 6443
        scheme: HTTPS
      initialDelaySeconds: 15
      timeoutSeconds: 15
    name: kube-apiserver-should-fail
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 250m
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /etc/kubernetes/
      name: k8s
      readOnly: true
    - mountPath: /etc/ssl/certs
      name: certs
      readOnly: true
    - mountPath: /etc/pki
      name: pki
      readOnly: true
  hostNetwork: true
  volumes:
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/kubernetes
    name: k8s
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/ssl/certs
    name: certs
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/pki
    name: pki
attempts.fixed_text:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: null
  labels:
    component: kube-apiserver
    tier: control-plane
  name: kube-apiserver-fail
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  containers:
  - command:
    - kube-apiserver
    - --anonymous-auth=false
    - --audit-log-path=/var/log/apiserver/audit.log
    - --authorization-mode=RBAC
    - --insecure-port=0
    - --profiling=false
    - --repair-malformed-updates=false
    - --service-account-lookup=true
    - --tls-min-version=VersionTLS12
    image: gcr.io/google_containers/kube-apiserver-amd64:v1.6.0
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 8
      httpGet:
        host: 127.0.0.1
        path: /healthz
        port: 6443
        scheme: HTTPS
      initialDelaySeconds: 15
      timeoutSeconds: 15
    name: kube-apiserver-should-fail
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 250m
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /etc/kubernetes/
      name: k8s
      readOnly: true
    - mountPath: /etc/ssl/certs
      name: certs
      readOnly: true
    - mountPath: /etc/pki
      name: pki
      readOnly: true
  hostNetwork: true
  volumes:
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/kubernetes
    name: k8s
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/ssl/certs
    name: certs
  - hostPath:
      path: /etc/pki
    name: pki
